description: 6-mo engagement; write polished monthly update from raw notes.

title: Build Stripe-powered checkout for course platform
description: One-time + subscription products, post-purchase webhooks, refunds.

title: Whop creator monetization setup
description: Launch paid Discord with Whop checkout + perks.

title: Tax filing for solo LLC ($120k revenue)
description: Federal + state + quarterly setup going forward.

title: Fractional CFO 8h/mo for $3M ARR SaaS
description: Monthly reporting, board prep, cash forecasting.

title: Drone real estate reel (cinematic)
description: Mavic 3 footage + edit, 90s reel.

title: Studio portraits for executive team (12 people)
description: On-site full-day shoot + retouching.

title: General Labor — Construction Site Cleanup
description: Daily cleanup of active residential construction site. Sweeping, hauling debris, moving materials. No experience needed. Boots required.

title: Framing Carpenter (Helper)
description: Assist lead carpenter with framing on new home builds. Must be reliable, able to lift 60 lbs, comfortable on ladders.

title: Painter — Interior Residential
description: Two-week project repainting a 4-bedroom home. Trim, walls, ceilings. Bring your own brushes; we supply paint.

title: Roofing Crew Member
description: Tear-off and reshingle on residential roofs. Hot work — must be OK with heights and physical conditions. Daily pay available.

title: Electrician's Apprentice
description: Pulling wire, mounting boxes, helping licensed electrician on commercial fit-out. Some experience preferred.

title: Plumber's Helper
description: Assist on residential service calls. Carry tools, dig, hold pipes, learn the trade. Driver's license required.

title: HVAC Install Helper
description: Help install residential AC systems. Carrying equipment, attic work. Hot, physical job — great pay.

title: Drywall Installer
description: Hang and finish drywall on remodel projects. 3+ years experience preferred but will train motivated workers.

title: Mover — Local Residential
description: Two-person moves, mostly 2-3 BR apartments. Must lift 75 lbs, no DUIs (we drive the truck). Tips on top of pay.

title: Furniture Delivery Driver
description: Box truck delivery of furniture to customers' homes. Help carry/assemble. Clean MVR required.

title: Warehouse Associate — Day Shift
description: Pick, pack, and ship orders from our distribution center. Standing/walking all day. Steel-toe boots provided.

title: Forklift Operator
description: Operate sit-down forklift loading trucks. Certification preferred but we'll train the right person. Overtime available.

title: Amazon DSP Delivery Driver
description: Drive a van delivering packages on a set route. 10-hour shifts, 4 days a week. Must be 21+ with clean driving record.

title: Junk Removal Crew
description: Two-person crews remove junk from homes and offices. Heavy lifting, physical work. Tips routine.

title: Landscape Crew Member
description: Mowing, edging, blowing, mulching at residential properties. 5 AM start, off by 2 PM. Outdoor work in all weather.

title: Tree Care Groundsman
description: Drag brush, chip wood, assist climbers. Hard physical job, great pay. No fear of heights required (you stay on the ground).

title: Pool Cleaner Technician
description: Weekly residential pool service route. We provide truck and supplies. Outdoor work, route in 78704/78745.

title: Sprinkler Repair Helper
description: Dig, locate breaks, replace heads. Outdoor work. Will train. Bring shovel and gloves.

title: Line Cook — Full Time
description: Busy farm-to-table restaurant looking for a line cook. 2+ years experience. Evenings and weekends.

title: Dishwasher
description: Evening dishwasher needed, 5 nights a week. Fast-paced kitchen, good crew. Free shift meal.

title: Server — Brunch Shift
description: Weekend brunch server at popular cafe. $$ tips. Must have 1+ year serving experience.

title: Barista
description: Specialty coffee shop hiring a barista. Latte art a plus. Mornings preferred. Tips pooled.

title: Catering Event Staff
description: Event-based work serving food at weddings and corporate events. Black pants required, we provide shirts.

title: House Cleaner
description: Clean residential homes, 2-3 per day. We provide supplies and transportation between jobs. Weekly pay.

title: Office Cleaner — Evenings
description: Clean office buildings 6 PM–10 PM, M-F. Vacuum, restrooms, trash, surfaces. Solo work after training.

title: Move-Out Deep Cleaner
description: Deep clean apartments between tenants. Detail work — baseboards, ovens, blinds. Project-based pay.

title: Retail Sales Associate
description: Boutique hiring associate for floor sales, restocking, register. Friendly, fashion-forward. Discount included.

title: Stock Clerk — Grocery
description: Overnight stock shift at grocery store. Unload trucks, face shelves. 10 PM–6 AM, 4 nights a week.

title: Caregiver — Senior Home Visits
description: Provide companionship, light housekeeping, meal prep for elderly clients in their homes. CPR certification a plus.

title: Dog Walker — South Austin Route
description: Walk 4-6 dogs per day on established route in 78704. Set your hours between 10 AM and 2 PM. Bring your own treats.

title: Bookkeeper — Hybrid
description: Small business bookkeeper, 2 days/week in our Austin office, 1 day remote. QuickBooks experience required.

title: Marketing Coordinator — Hybrid
description: Coordinate local marketing campaigns. 3 days in office, 2 remote. Event planning + social media.
